title: Polish and finalize Education Timeline section

requirements.summary: Review and polish the Education Timeline section to clearly display all four academic milestones with proper labeling, institution names, qualifications, descriptive labels, and ensure the vertical alternating timeline layout with sky-blue markers and scroll-triggered animations remain intact and responsive
acceptanceCriteria: All four education milestones are visible in the Education section in chronological order.
Each milestone displays the institution name, qualification/level, and a short descriptive label.
The vertical timeline layout with sky-blue markers is preserved.
Scroll-triggered entrance animations are functional for each milestone.
The section is fully responsive on mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Update the Education Timeline component to display all four milestones in chronological order: (1) Nimatpur Girls High School – BSE (10th) with label 'Secondary Education', (2) CHSE – +2 (12th) with label 'Higher Secondary', (3) +3 Degree (Bachelor's) with label 'Graduation', (4) PGDCA / Multimedia training at Mayuri Multimedia with label 'Diploma in Computer Applications & Multimedia'. Ensure each entry prominently displays the institution name, qualification/level as a subtitle, and includes the descriptive label. Preserve the existing vertical alternating timeline layout, sky-blue milestone markers, scroll-triggered animations using the useScrollAnimation hook, and ensure full responsiveness across mobile and desktop viewports.
